since_last: 94% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.79%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 94% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.38% · Gold -0.74% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 94% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.79%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.79%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +4.20%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.20%, ORCL +3.82%, PLTR +3.69%, AMAT +3.63%, CEVA +3.38%. Laggards: MU -0.72%, AES -0.41%, D -0.32%, DELL -0.20%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.42% at $156.93
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
